title: Novacron Press
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Novacron Press''' was a company that published [[Book/Legends|books]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], including [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Vo'ren Faalo/Legends|Vo'ren Faalo's]] ''[[Book of Practical Lightsaber Technique]]''.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
